labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 621391 ($2,024,495,626) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 621391 ($5,518,101,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.derivation: margin 0.1580 (margins.json[62]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Hospitals/Healthcare Facilities EBITDA/Sales 15.80% (closest named bucket for provider economics; public support-services bucket at 3.87% reflects a different business model)); revenue/employee $150,001 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 621391); class <5: 4,196 firms, avg revenue/firm $340,111 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $53,737 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 1,601 firms, avg revenue/firm $837,348 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $132,301 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 554 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,879,892 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $297,023 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 222 firms, avg revenue/firm $5,010,027 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $791,584 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 25 firms, avg revenue/firm $19,523,880 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $3,084,773 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 41 firms, avg revenue/firm $2,649,268 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $418,584 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 25
n_band.margin_source: Damodaran Jan 2026: Hospitals/Healthcare Facilities EBITDA/Sales 15.80% (closest named bucket for provider economics; public support-services bucket at 3.87% reflects a different business model)
